entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A rainfed crop in India used for pod yield and oil production

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand water-limited conditions, particularly mid- and end-season

entities.name: POD YIELD
entities.description: The measure of productivity in groundnut varieties under various conditions

entities.name: WATER-USE-EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The efficiency with which a plant uses water for growth and production

entities.name: DISEASE RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a crop variety to resist attacks from pathogens

entities.name: QUALITY TRAITS
entities.description: Characteristics of the crop that meet the needs of farmers, consumers, and industries

entities.name: EMPIRICAL APPROACH
entities.description: A breeding method based on observation and experience

entities.name: TRAIT-BASED APPROACH
entities.description: A breeding method focused on selecting specific desired traits

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: Environmental stress caused by a lack of available water

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the groundnut research and cultivation are focused

entities.name: ICAR
entities.description: Indian Council of Agricultural Research, involved in breeding programs

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, involved in breeding programs

entities.name: ICGV 91114
entities.description: An early-maturing and drought-tolerant groundnut variety released by ICRISAT

entities.name: ANANTHAPUR DISTRICT
entities.description: A drought-prone district in Andhra Pradesh, India

entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH
entities.description: A state in India containing the Ananthapur district

entities.name: LOW AND ERRATIC RAINFALL
entities.description: Weather condition characterized by low volume and unpredictable timing of rain

entities.name: RUST
entities.description: A foliar fungal disease used for screening groundnut lines

entities.name: LLS DISEASE
entities.description: Leaf spot disease, a foliar fungal disease used for screening groundnut lines

entities.name: INTROGRESSION LINES
entities.description: Lines derived from ICGV 91114 by introducing specific genetic segments

entities.name: MULTI-LOCATION TRIALS
entities.description: Evaluation of crop lines across different geographical locations

entities.name: RAINFED CONDITIONS
entities.description: Agricultural conditions where water is supplied only by precipitation

entities.name: ICGV 14410
entities.description: A superior introgression line proposed for NILs trials

entities.name: ICGV 13189
entities.description: A superior introgression line proposed for NILs trials

entities.name: ICGV 14421
entities.description: A superior introgression line proposed for NILs trials

entities.name: NILS TRIAL
entities.description: Near-isogenic lines trial used to evaluate specific genetic differences

entities.name: AICRP-G
entities.description: All India Coordinated Research Project on Groundnut

entities.name: PRODUCTION ECOLOGIES
entities.description: The diverse environmental settings where crops are produced
